body:
Two changes to the RelayListener setup:

1. POLLING INTERVAL: Change from 1 minute to 30 seconds. Update the scheduled task trigger RepetitionInterval from New-TimeSpan -Minutes 1 to New-TimeSpan -Seconds 30. Unregister and re-register the task. Confirm LastTaskResult=0.

2. WINDOW STYLE: The PowerShell window that opens on cold-boot should launch as a normal visible open window, not minimized or hidden. Update the Start-Process call in relay-listener.ps1 to remove -WindowStyle Hidden from the pwsh launch args (the wscript/VBScript launcher that hides the listener tick is fine -- that stays hidden. Only the Claude Code session window itself should be fully visible and in focus when it opens).

Update source scripts at C:\Users\User\Desktop\Work\# EX MACHINA ocus\x_strategies ix\ after making changes. Confirm both changes working and report back via relay.
